calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-11-2019 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance by self represented plaintiff. There being no appearance, the Court ordered the case dismissed pursuant to Government Code Section 68608(b). All previously imposed sanctions against the plaintiff are vacated. Judge: GARRETT L. WONG; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-30-2019 Continued To Apr-09-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. Self-represented plaintiff is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order To Show Cause is re-set to Apr-09-2019 at 10:30am in Department 610. NOTE: This case is subject to dismissal pursuant to Government Code 68608(b) if there is no appearance on the next hearing date and compliance. Judge: GARRETT L. WONG; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-09-2018 Set For Order To Show Cause On Jun-12-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-14-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT GEICO GENERAL INSURANCE COMPANY's MOTION TO STRIKE REQUEST FOR EXEMPLARY DAMAGES FROM COMPLAINT.

Defendant GEICO General Insurance Company's motion to strike request for exemplary damages in the complaint filed by plaintiff Jennifer Toy is off calendar as moot in light of the ruling on GEICO's demurrer.

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, torreanom@aol.com, Reported. (D302/HK)

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-14-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT GEICO GENERAL INSURANCE COMPANY's DEMURRER TO PLAINTIFF'S COMPLAINT FOR DAMAGES

Defendant GEICO General Insurance Company's demurrer to all causes of action alleged against it in the complaint filed by plaintiff Jennifer Toy is sustained without leave to amend as to all causes of action. No opposition filed.

Counsel for GEICO is required to prepare a proposed order which repeates verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling and states that the demurrer was not opposed.

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, torreanom@aol.com, Reported. (D302/HK)
